## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change in concrete terms.

## Scope

Which areas are affected?

- [ ] `profiles/marketing-ops/config.yaml`
- [ ] `profiles/marketing-ops/SOUL.md`
- [ ] `profiles/marketing-ops/skills/marketing-outreach-ops/SKILL.md`
- [ ] `scripts/bootstrap_marketing_profile.sh`
- [ ] `scripts/install_marketing_routines.sh`
- [ ] `scripts/export_marketing_pack.sh`
- [ ] Docs

## Alternatives Considered

What other options were considered?

## Success Criteria

How will we know this feature is complete and useful?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or references.
